name: Red Curry Beef
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds Beef Steak, Cut Into Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine half of the coconut milk and curry base over low heat.
2. When oil appears on the surface, add meat.
3. Simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Add remaining ingredients and cover.
5. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve over rice or Thai Jasmine Rice and garnish with sweet basil.
